deviations.what: the Image src binds {img>/products/pic1} in the original, a JSON image model not available server-side; a static demo image URL is used instead.

the original narrows the width to 50em on phones via sap/ui/Device in the controller; restored 2026-07-16 as the expression {= ${device>/system/phone} ? '50em' : '100em' } over the framework's device> model (source-verified available in main views) - confirm the width switches on a phone.
